zh.Royal License: 古巴皮納爾 德爾 德爾里奧羅雅爾
zh.Greystoke, Eden, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可
zh.Wortley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy De Greystoke於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Ralph Fitzwilliam25歲，母親Margery de Bolebec40歲。她於1317年與Sir Nicholas De Wortley在英國越可爾沃特利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世在英國越可爾沃特利。

zh-hans.Royal License: 古巴皮納爾 德爾 德爾里奧羅雅爾
zh-hans.Greystoke, Eden, Cumberland, England: 英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可
zh-hans.Wortley, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾沃特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy De Greystoke于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Ralph Fitzwilliam25岁，母亲Margery de Bolebec40岁。她于1317年与Sir Nicholas De Wortley在英国越可爾沃特利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世在英国越可爾沃特利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy De Greystoke was born about 1280, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Fitzwilliam, was 25 and her mother, Margery de Bolebec, was 40. She married Sir Nicholas De Wortley in 1317, in Wortley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in Wortley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy De Greystoke est née environ 1280, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Fitzwilliam, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margery de Bolebec, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas De Wortley en 1317, à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy De Greystoke um 1280 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Fitzwilliam 25 und ihre Mutter Margery de Bolebec 40. Sie hat 1317 in Wortley, Yorkshire, England Sir Nicholas De Wortley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb in Wortley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy De Greystoke è nata il circa 1280 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Fitzwilliam, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margery de Bolebec, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas De Wortley nel 1317, nel Wortley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Wortley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Royal License: キューバピナル デル ルiオロイアル
ja.Greystoke, Eden, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストク
ja.Wortley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリー
ja.Wortley, Barnsley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリー
ja.lifeSummary: Lucy De Greystokeが約1280年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Ralph Fitzwilliamは25歳，母Margery de Bolebecは40歳であった。1317年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーでSir Nicholas De Wortleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy De Greystoke(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Fitzwilliam(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Bolebec(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1317년 영국 요르크실르 워틀리에서 Sir Nicholas De Wortley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 요르크실르 워틀리에서 사망했다.

mn.Wortley, Yorkshire, England: Wortley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy De Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Fitzwilliam, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Bolebec, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas De Wortley em 1317, em Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy De Greystoke родилась около 1280 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Fitzwilliam было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Bolebec, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas De Wortley в 1317 г. в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy De Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1280, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Fitzwilliam, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margery de Bolebec, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas De Wortley en 1317, en Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
